artPrompt: A teetering pyramid of glowing red snack-charms heaped on an overturned crate in the burning square, each little token catching firelight as fresh ones bloom into being above the pile; bonfires flicker flame-orange around the hoard, sparks and confetti drifting through ember-red haze and night-black smoke, the endless snack-bounty rendered warm and wistful, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Mayor's Snack Budget
text:
At the beginning of your end step, create a Snack token. (A Snack is a red artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 1 life.")
Whenever you sacrifice a Snack, Gnasher, er, your commander, gets +1/+1 until end of turn and a creature you control gains haste.
flavorText: Line item one: snacks. Line item two: more snacks. There is no line item three.
